name: pie-reveal
title: PieReveal
description: A single-arc SVG ring that fills from 0 to a target percent on SPRING_SMOOTH, with the value rendered in the center. One muted accent stroke against a quiet track — the Onda data primitive.
pickWhen: a single percentage where the share IS the message — completion, conversion, NPS. Use `progress-bar` horizontal; `bar-chart` for many.
